title: Clean up epic dependencies for tskl-l4q and tskl-34w
description: Remove stale blockers from tskl-34w now that upstream epics are closed; verify tskl-l4q block relationship and leave clear status.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_close_reason: Removed closed-epic blockers from tskl-34w; verified tskl-l4q remains open due to backlog review task.
custom.beads_notes:
Removed closed-epic blockers from tskl-34w: tskl-5er, tskl-76b, tskl-8ke, tskl-eyu, tskl-p3i, tskl-2ly. Remaining blockers are open epics tskl-l4q and tskl-nqs. Synced JSONL.
Reviewed tskl-l4q: only remaining child is tskl-l4q.8 (backlog, non-developer review pending). Left tskl-l4q open and still blocking tskl-34w.
